competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot:
# GitHub Copilot: Key Features & Marketing Content

## Core Product Features

**Agent & Autonomous Capabilities:**
- "Ship faster with AI that work alongside you" - Users can "Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex, and let them plan, explore, and execute work autonomously in the background."
- The Copilot GitHub AI assistant appears as a selectable assignee option in GitHub issues for task delegation.

**Multi-File & Context Awareness:**
When generating suggestions, the system examines "the code in your editor—focusing on the lines just before and after your cursor, but also information including other files open in your editor and the URLs of repositories."

**Copilot Spaces:**
The platform allows users to "Turn Copilot into a project expert" by creating "a shared source of truth that includes context from your docs and repositories" to "Scale knowledge and keep teams consistent."

**Agents on GitHub:**
A dedicated feature enabling developers to "use GitHub Copilot, your own custom agents, or the third-party ones you already rely on."

## Marketing Positioning

Core message: "Your AI accelerator for every workflow, from the editor to the enterprise" with emphasis on staying "in your flow" across multiple environments (GitHub, IDE, terminals, chat apps).

The product emphasizes that developers report "up to 75% higher satisfaction" and are "up to 55% more productive at writing code."

changes.description: 新增开发者效率统计数据：满意度提升75%、编码生产力提升55%，强化企业采购背书
changes.evidence: 「developers report 'up to 75% higher satisfaction' and are 'up to 55% more productive at writing code'」

changes.description: Copilot 已成为 GitHub Issues 可选 assignee，AI agent 以任务责任人身份嵌入 issue 流转
changes.evidence: 「The Copilot GitHub AI assistant appears as a selectable assignee option in GitHub issues for task delegation」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI 作为 assignee 在 issue 系统中承接任务，进一步具象化 AI session 在协作协议中的角色

key_findings: 核心竞争功能（Agents on GitHub、Copilot Spaces）与上期一致，无新增结构性变化
Copilot 作为 GitHub Issues assignee 的细节浮现，AI 在任务流中的具体协作角色更清晰
新增效率统计背书（75% 满意度提升、55% 生产力提升），强化企业侧说服力
